name: Yu Lan Ch'ao Niu Jou (Sliced Beef with Brocco)
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------MARINADE-------------------------
1 teaspoon Sugar
1/2 tablespoon Soy sauce
1/2 teaspoon Baking soda
2 teaspoons Cornstarch
1 tablespoon Cold water
1 tablespoon Oil
1 lb Broccoli
15 Scallions, cut into 1-inch pieces (about 1/2 inch)
15 Ginger pieces
----------------------SEASONING SAUCE----------------------
1 tablespoon Soy sauce
2 tablespoons Oyster sauce
1 tablespoon Wine
1 teaspoon Sugar
1/2 teaspoon Cornstarch
2 cups Oil
1. Slice the beef across the grain into 1-inch slices.
2. Place in a bowl and add sugar, soy sauce, baking soda, cornstarch, cold water, and mix well.
3. Add oil and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, wine, sugar, and cornstarch to prepare the seasoning sauce.
5. Cut broccoli into 1-inch pieces and remove stems. Boil in boiling water for 30 seconds, then drain and dry.
6. Heat oil in a frying pan until hot (about 300°F).
7. Stir fry beef for about 10 seconds until done. Remove from pan and drain excess oil.
8. Add more oil to the same pan and stir fry scallions and ginger for a few seconds.
9. Add broccoli and stir fry for 10 seconds.
10. Return beef to pan, add seasoning sauce, and stir quickly over high heat until mixed.
11. Transfer to a platter and serve hot.
